about.chairmanAlt: Eng. Ashraf Yassin, Chairman and Managing Director
about.paragraph1: At QSG, we are proud of the diversity of our business portfolio, the global reach of our operations, and—most importantly—the strength, capabilities, and experience of our exceptional team.
about.paragraph2: For almost 30 years, our Group has built a reputation as a trusted leader in independent third-party inspection (TPI), trade conformity assessment, banking inspection services, and specialized management consulting.
about.paragraph3: Our people’s passion, dedication, and expertise, guided by visionary leadership, have enabled us to consistently deliver excellence and exceed our clients’ expectations.
about.paragraph4: Leading this Group is both an honor and a responsibility. Together, we continue to build on our legacy, embrace innovation, and drive sustainable growth for the future.

accreditation.title: Accreditations, Registrations and Agency Contracts
accreditation.listAria: List of accreditations, registrations and agency contracts
accreditation.detail1:
The Company is registered in the Central Bank of Egypt list of approved firms in the asset valuation field.
(land and buildings - machinery and equipment - goods) Registered No. (5).
accreditation.detail2: Registered with the Financial Regulatory Authority (FRA) as Real Estate Valuation Experts No. (10).
accreditation.detail3: Registered with the Financial Regulatory Authority (FRA) as Asset Revaluation Experts No. (8).
accreditation.detail4: Registered with the National Organization for Potable Water and Sanitary Drainage (NOPWASD) – Department of Testing and Industry Control since 1998.
accreditation.detail5: Holds the ISO 9001:2015 certificate since 1999 and is renewed periodically.
accreditation.detail6: The company's experts hold the 'LEEA' certification – Lifting Equipment Engineers Association.
accreditation.detail7: The company’s experts hold the "ASME" (Authorized Inspection Supervisor).
accreditation.detail8: The Company is a member of the American Society for Testing and Materials (ASTM) - Account #2517234.
accreditation.detail9: Holds an authorized agency contract with Arotec Inspection GmbH.
accreditation.detail10: A sole and exclusive agent for Marketing and Sale of inspection and Consultancy services in UAE to Dome Oilfield Engineering and Services LLC.
accreditation.detail11: A cooperation agreement is in place with ValuStrat Consulting FZCO – UAE to provide asset valuation and appraisal services

aboutQSG.heading: QUALITY SERVICES GROUP (QSG)
aboutQSG.description1: A private Egyptian Joint Stock company established in 1997 with a current paid in capital of EGP 4 million, and is wholly owned and operated by Egyptian nationals.
aboutQSG.description2: The company’s scope of work includes the following activities:
aboutQSG.description3: To carry out its work, QSG relies on a selected group of experts with extensive technical expertise, gained through broad experience inside Egypt and internationally.
aboutQSG.description4: The company holds the ISO 9001 certificate since 1999 (currently ISO 9001:2015) and is renewed periodically, providing evidence of our ongoing conformity to quality management system requirements.

company.title: The Company
company.overview: The company's workforce includes 32 experts, consultants, and specialists at the head office in Cairo and the Alexandria branch.
company.mission: To provide our clients with the highest level of performance, quality, and outstanding services, to fulfill their expectations and guarantee their satisfaction.
workMethodology: Full commitment to international professional standards.
Providing continuous training for our team to enhance their technical and managerial skills.
Encouraging and motivating our staff to foster creativity, innovation, and teamwork.
company.objectives: To achieve a strong presence in the Egyptian and international markets as a leading Egyptian company providing third-party services in site surveys, inspection, asset valuation, and consulting services.
achievements: Obtaining international accreditation for asset valuation activities.
Developing solid relations with our agents worldwide.
Enhancing performance by leveraging modern technologies.
Providing ASME services in Egypt and across the globe.
company.isoImageAlt: ISO certification at the company office

ashrafHero.name: Eng. Ashraf Yassin
ashrafHero.alt: Portrait of Eng. Ashraf Yassin, Chairman and Managing Director
ashrafHero.education: B.Sc. and M.Sc. degree in Production Engineering, specializing in Industrial Measurements and Inspection. Extensive leadership background as Chairperson with a proven track record of success in both:
experience: 1. Crude Oil Production – covering production planning, marine terminal management and operations, crude oil transportation, storage, and export measurement. Experience includes more than 23 years with the ADNOC Group (ADCO) in the UAE and 4 years with SUMED Pipelines in Egypt.
2. Inspection, Asset Valuation, Surveying and Consultancy – Founder and Managing Director for almost 30 years of Quality Services Group (QSG), a leading Egyptian private company established in 1997.
ashrafHero.expertise: Areas of expertise include management, negotiation, operational management, strategic planning, business strategy, and business development, supported by a strong history of driving operational performance and sustainable expansion.

teamExperience: The group’s technical and managerial years of experience
assetsValuationIntro1: In the process of valuation, we estimate the hypothetical price or cash equivalent on a specific date for the asset to be valued, based on specific criteria and standards. set by Central Bank of Egypt and the Financial Regulatory Authority .
assetsValuationIntro2: It includes specifying the type of value required (market value, investment value, rental value, lease, etc.), the purpose of the valuation and the report, as well as the type of asset, its classification, and the benefits of its use.
assetsValuationIntro3: This requires familiarity with market mechanisms, and consideration of economic and political circumstances.
assetsValuationIntro4: Assets Valuation process is carried out by a team of highly skilled professionals with expertise in the various conditions affecting each type of property, considering all elements that may affect the valuation outcome.

valuationPurpose.legalStatus: Changing the legal form or status of companies.
valuationPurpose.corporateRestructuring: Corporate restructuring through mergers or demergers.

assetsValuation.includes: Assets valuation service includes but is not limited to:
assetsValuation.goods: Goods (Raw material, Semi-finished, and finished products)
projectsFollowUp: In addition to projects progress follow up.
integratedProjects: Integrated projects valuations conducted by the group include:
integratedProjects.transport: Means of transportation including land, sea, air, etc.
integratedProjects.variousRigs: Several types of rigs including land, marine and petroleum.
integratedProjects.antiques: Antiques, artifacts and rare art pieces.
totalAssets2023_2024: The total valuated assets for the fiscal years 2023 / 2024

intro.p1: The company delivers its inspection services through a team of highly qualified inspectors with extensive local and international technical expertise across various specializations. These professionals are considered a cornerstone in establishing client confidence and play a vital role in enhancing the company’s credibility and success both locally and internationally.
intro.p2: Inspection activities are conducted at suppliers’ facilities, ports of shipment (loading/unloading), or ports of arrival, to verify the conformity of goods with the contractual terms and specifications, as well as with the applicable national and international standards.

process.title: Inspection process includes the following:
items: Attending -as an eye witness- laboratory and performance tests (when required)
process.note: Finally Inspection certificates and reports are to be issued.

engineering.title: 1-Engineering inspection includes the following:
items: Mechanical and electromechanical equipment related to the construction and expansion of water pumping stations and wastewater treatment plants across industrial facilities worldwide.
Testing of lifting appliances including but not limited to:

food.title: 2- Food Industry Inspection
items: Inspection of containers and ship holds before loading

industrial.title: Inspection of Industrial, chemical, and petroleum production facilities:
industrial.p1: Inspection is carried out visually, utilizing Non-Destructive Testing (NDT) techniques for support, aided by specialized equipment.
industrial.p2: Inspection is primarily conducted to ensure the integrity and safe operation of equipment, for example within oil and gas processing/production facilities or petrochemical plants. This process is essential to mitigate risks associated with non-compliance or deviations from agreed and contracted requirements.
industrial.p3: The duration of the inspection process varies depending on the scope and nature of the assignment ranging from one working day carried out by one inspector, to extended engagements handled by specialized inspection team, and is carried out as follows:
items: Conduct a technical diagnosis of any observed problem
Follow up the implementation of corrective action
If the corrective actions meet the required standards, the equipment is approved for further service

ships.title: Ships Inspection:
ships.checkingTitle: Includes checking the validity of the following:
additional: Ship’s Drafts measurement to specify the weight of loaded goods
Measuring ship’s tanks loaded with different kinds of fluids

feasibility.title: 1- Feasibility Studies
paragraphs: We are partners with our clients since the initiation of the idea to define a clear scope including technical and commercial details, then preparation of the project’s feasibility study all the way to a full project implementation.
During the consulting process, we adapt our methodology to fit our clients’ needs, creating a clear roadmap that ensures effectiveness and viability.
Our consulting services for feasibility studies are provided by experienced specialists who offer a commercially and technically oriented advice on overall project feasibility.
We carry out the process with the assistance of technical engineering experts, project managers, sales specialists, and financial analysts with expertise across various fields.
feasibility.examplesTitle: Examples of Feasibility studies conducted by the company for various projects

industrial.title: 1- Industrial fields
items: Plastic bags, packaging straps, and handbags

agriculture.title: 2- Agriculture and Aquaculture
items: Sorting, packaging, cooling, and freezing station

feed.title: 3- Feed industries and poultry production farms
items: Layer poultry and broiler chicken farms

consulting.title: 2- Consulting Services
paragraphs: QSG provides consultations and technical assistance through well selected specialists with wide technical and managerial experience.
We provide integrated services to meet our clients’ needs and to guarantee full participation and commitment.

oilGas.introTitle: We provide ASME services, in addition to the inspection on equipment of Oil, Gas and Petrochemical plants including the following:
items: All types of vessels, columns, towers
Over pressure protective devices (safety & relief valves)
Asset integrity risks and failure analysis
Corrosion control & inspection / condition assessment for static facilities
